title: FastGrowth
body:
# Fastgrowth
*Shift to make crops/trees grow*

This mod is currently available for Minecraft 1.15.2 and 1.16.x, 1.17.x, 1.18.1, you can ask nicely for a port in another version on the github issue
 
### Dependencies

This mod only need fabric-api to work.
If you are using ModMenu, you will also need ClothConfig APIv2

### More infos

If this mod is on a server, you do NOT need it to connect to this server.
FastGrowth may be included in mod packs at will. No direct permissions are necessary. However, A list of mods, their authors, and the permission information must be made available for your pack.

 
Thanks to Samekichi for the chinese translation !!!
